rationale: Section 49.205 governs career and technology education agreements for districts exceeding entitlement. The homestead exemption increase does not directly amend or contradict its operative provisions.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district with a local revenue level in excess of entitlement may reduce the district's local revenue level by executing an agreement to provide students of one or more other districts with career and technology education
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal effects on local revenue levels are possible but do not create a statutory conflict with this section's operative text.
